title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents a six-step workflow for maximizing Claude project outcomes: web scraping to discover data, ingest-source to build knowledge bases, improve-system for iterative refinement, ask-the-board for multi-perspective feedback, internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The approach is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project.
